pet_policy.summary: Pets are permitted on TechMellon Airlines flights subject to the conditions below.

cabin.notes: The carrier must be well-ventilated and the pet must remain inside at all times.

hold.crate_requirements: IATA-approved travel crate with food and water dispensers
hold.notes: Hold pet spaces are limited to 2 per flight. Snub-nosed breeds are not accepted in the hold on flights over 4 hours.

service_animals.notes: Recognised guide dogs and assistance dogs travel free in the cabin. Documentation from a registered assistance dog organisation required.

pram_pushchair.notes: One pram per booking accepted. Folded dimensions must not exceed 120 × 60 × 40 cm.

sports_equipment.notes: Must be declared at booking. Bicycles must have pedals removed and handlebars turned.

musical_instruments.notes: Instruments over 56 × 45 × 25 cm must be checked in the hold.

delayed_or_lost_baggage.report_location: Baggage Services desk at arrivals or baggage.techmellon.com
delayed_or_lost_baggage.notes: Keep all receipts for essential purchases while bag is delayed. Original receipts required for reimbursement.

cabin_prohibited: lithium batteries over 100Wh without prior approval

checkin_policy.notes: Passengers with special assistance should arrive at least 2 hours before departure and notify staff at check-in.

flexible_fare.notes: Full refund to original payment method. Ancillary fees (bags, seats) also refunded.

standard_fare.notes: Ticket value converted to travel credit valid 12 months. No cash refund. Change fee applies per passenger.

cancellation_by_airline.notes: If TechMellon cancels the flight, full refund plus EU261 compensation applies where applicable.

no_show_policy.notes: Passengers who do not check in and do not contact us forfeit the full ticket value regardless of fare type.

name_change_policy.notes: One spelling correction is free of charge within 24 hours of booking.

WCHR.description: Passenger can walk up stairs but needs wheelchair for long distances in terminal
WCHR.service: Wheelchair from check-in to aircraft door

WCHS.description: Passenger cannot walk up stairs but can move short distances
WCHS.service: Wheelchair throughout terminal and lifted up/down aircraft steps

WCHC.description: Passenger is completely immobile and must be carried to seat
WCHC.service: Full assistance from kerb to seat, aisle wheelchair on board

other_codes.BLND: Assistance for visually impaired passengers, including guidance through terminal
other_codes.DEAF: Assistance for hearing impaired passengers, including visual boarding alerts
other_codes.DPNA: Assistance for passengers with intellectual or developmental disabilities
other_codes.MEDA: Medical clearance required — passenger travelling with a medical condition

special_assistance.check_in_requirement: Passengers requiring WCHC assistance must check in at least 90 minutes before departure.
special_assistance.aisle_wheelchair: Available on all aircraft. Request via WCHC code.

oxygen.personal_oxygen_concentrators: Permitted on board. Must be FAA/EASA approved. Battery must last 150% of flight duration.
oxygen.airline_oxygen: Not available. Passengers must arrange their own supply.

special_assistance.notes: All assistance is free of charge. Service dogs are permitted in cabin free of charge with advance notice.

infant.bassinet_note: Bassinet seats are bulkhead rows. Request at booking — subject to availability.

child.notes: Children must be seated next to an accompanying adult.

unaccompanied_minor.service_includes: Escorted from check-in to seat, met at destination by named adult
unaccompanied_minor.required_documentation: UM form, ID of accompanying adult at departure and collection, emergency contact details

seat_selection.free_at_checkin: Standard seats are available free of charge at online check-in 24 hours before departure.

seat_types.window: Seats A and F on most aircraft
seat_types.aisle: Seats C and D on short-haul, C and G on long-haul
seat_types.middle: Seat B on short-haul, D and E on long-haul
seat_types.extra_legroom: Rows 1 to 3 and exit rows. Minimum 6 inches additional legroom.
seat_types.exit_row_restrictions: Passengers must be 15 or older, able-bodied, and willing to assist in an emergency. Not suitable for passengers travelling with infants.

upgrade_policy.notes: La Casa members can bid for upgrades or use loyalty points at techmellon.com/manage.

Silver.entry_requirement: 4000 tier points in a calendar year

Gold.entry_requirement: 8000 tier points in a calendar year

Platinum.entry_requirement: 15000 tier points in a calendar year
benefits: unlimited lounge access including a guest

redemption.flight_redemption: Points can be redeemed against any flight at techmellon.com/manage
redemption.expiry: Points expire after 24 months of account inactivity

economy.short_haul_under_2h: Snacks and beverages available for purchase
economy.long_haul_over_4h: Full meal service included. Choice of two options.

meal_and_onboard_policy.business: Multi-course meal with wine list on all flights over 1.5 hours.
meal_and_onboard_policy.first: Chef-designed menu with sommelier-selected wines. Pre-order available 72 hours before departure.

special_meals.notes: Special meals must be requested at booking or no later than 24 hours before departure.

meal_and_onboard_policy.alcohol: Complimentary in business and first. Available for purchase in economy on flights over 2 hours. Not served to passengers who appear intoxicated.

travel_documents_policy.general: Passengers are responsible for ensuring they hold valid travel documents for their destination.
travel_documents_policy.passport: Must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the date of travel for most destinations.
travel_documents_policy.visa: TechMellon does not provide visa advice. Check with the embassy or consulate of your destination country.
travel_documents_policy.esta_etias: US-bound passengers from visa-waiver countries require ESTA. EU-bound non-EU nationals may require ETIAS.
travel_documents_policy.name_matching: The name on your ticket must exactly match the name on your passport or travel document.
travel_documents_policy.id_domestic: Photo ID required for all domestic check-ins — passport, driving licence, or national ID card.
travel_documents_policy.denied_boarding_for_documents: TechMellon is not liable for costs incurred if a passenger is denied boarding due to inadequate travel documents.

eu261_compensation.notes: EU261 applies to flights departing from EU/UK airports, or arriving into EU/UK on an EU/UK carrier. Not payable for extraordinary circumstances such as severe weather or ATC strikes.

payment_policy.currency: GBP primary. Prices shown in local currency where applicable.
payment_policy.price_guarantee: Prices are guaranteed once payment is confirmed.
payment_policy.booking_fee: No booking fee on techmellon.com. Third-party booking sites may charge additional fees.
payment_policy.fraud_prevention: Additional verification may be required for high-value bookings.

group_booking_policy.definition: 10 or more passengers travelling together on the same flight
benefits: flexible name changes up to 7 days before departure
group_booking_policy.notes: Group bookings cannot be made online. Contact the groups desk directly.

medical_fitness_policy.general: Passengers with serious medical conditions should consult their doctor before flying.

required_for: passengers who have had surgery in the past 10 days
passengers requiring medical equipment on board
passengers who may be unable to sit upright for the duration of the flight
meda_clearance.process: Complete a MEDIF form at techmellon.com/medical. Allow 5 working days for clearance.

pregnancy.after_28_weeks_requires: Medical certificate confirming fitness to fly and expected due date, dated within 10 days of travel

medical_fitness_policy.recent_surgery: Passengers who have had surgery within 10 days must obtain MEDA clearance before flying.
medical_fitness_policy.diving: Passengers should not fly within 24 hours of scuba diving.

environmental_policy.sustainable_aviation_fuel: TechMellon blends 5% SAF across its fuel supply, targeting 10% by 2030.
environmental_policy.single_use_plastics: Eliminated from cabin service since 2023. All onboard packaging is recyclable or compostable.
